title: Ending Violence Against Women and Girls: Experiences and attitudes of 16 year olds in Northern Ireland in 2024
body: "This publication reports results from the gender-based violence module of the 2024 Young Life and Times Survey which is a survey of 16 year olds in Northern Ireland, and follows previous reports in 2022 and 2023. This report provides commentary on young people’s experiences of various types of violent acts and behaviours. Attitudes on safety, reporting and relationships are also discussed. "
